title: JBCクラシックの後に・眩しいの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The news of Smart Falcon's third straight victory
at the JBC Classic monopolizes online trends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her popularity continues to grow, she
appears to be focusing less on individual
impressions and more on the numerical metrics of
success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, she runs into one of her first
fans, a girl who says she loves how Smart Falcon
sparkles. But the Umadol herself can't see her
own sparkle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Smart Falcon shaken, I decide to have a
serious talk with her before her next race, the
Champions Cup.
